models._comment: Unique model id used by API (model_name) and UI selection.
models._comment_type: Model family/type tag (kept for compatibility; not used for dynamic dispatch).
models.label: Transformer-CNN Crack Forecasting
models.description: Time-series forecasting model (PyTorch) trained for crack meters only. Not applicable to other sensor types unless retrained.
models._comment_adapter: Adapter class name used by the backend registry factory.
models._comment_meta_file: Optional metadata file (JSON). Its contents are merged into this config for capabilities/requirements.
